name: tencent-dasb
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Cloud Operation Security Center read-only and audit query APIs.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeUserGr.name: describe-user-groups
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeUserGr.description: Query Tencent Cloud DASB user groups.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeDevice.name: describe-device-accounts
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeDevice.description: Query Tencent Cloud DASB device accounts.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeAcls.name: describe-acls
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeAcls.description: Query Tencent Cloud DASB ACL policies.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeLoginE.name: describe-login-event
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeLoginE.description: Query Tencent Cloud DASB login events.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeOperat.name: describe-operation-event
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/DescribeOperat.description: Query Tencent Cloud DASB operation events.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchAuditLog.name: search-audit-log
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchAuditLog.description: Search Tencent Cloud DASB audit logs.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchCommandB.name: search-command-by-sid
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchCommandB.description: Search Tencent Cloud DASB commands by session ID.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchFile.name: search-file
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchFile.description: Search Tencent Cloud DASB file operation records.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchFileBySi.name: search-file-by-sid
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchFileBySi.description: Search Tencent Cloud DASB file operation records by session ID.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchSessionC.name: search-session-command
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/SearchSessionC.description: Search Tencent Cloud DASB session commands.

Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/InvokeReadOnly.name: invoke-read-only-action
Tencent_DASB.Tencent_DASB/InvokeReadOnly.description: Invoke an allowed Tencent Cloud DASB Describe* or Search* action.
